title: SMPC Architects
description:
SMPC Architects is an architecture firm based in Albuquerque, New Mexico, specializing in creat
ing innovative and sustainable spaces. The firm focuses on community-oriented projects and coll
aborates closely with clients to meet their needs.

We will upload 163gb of corporate data soon. Employee personal information (passports, DLs, SSN
cards and so on), financials, lots of contracts and confidential settlements, NDAs, clients an
d partners information, etc.
